description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: North Lantau Highway, MTRCL’s Siu Ho Wan Depot
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 北大嶼山公路，近地鐵小濠灣車廠

2024-09-10T11:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Motorists are advised that in order to facilitate the construction works of Tung Chung New Town Extension - Tai Ho Interchange, a section of fast lane at North Lantau Highway near MTRCL’s Siu Ho Wan Depot (both Airport Bound and Tsing Yi Bound) will be temporarily closed from 14 September 2024. Passengers to the airport should reserve adequate time for the journey.
2024-09-10T11:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 駕駛人士請注意，為配合東涌新市鎮擴展-大蠔交匯處工程，北大嶼山公路近地鐵小濠灣車廠對出一段來回快線，將於2024年9月14日開始臨時封閉。往機場的旅客請預留充足時間前往機場。
